artifacts.removeNote: Only the registry rows are removed. Each agent's workspace files stay where they were written — clean those up from the workspace section of each agent's config panel if you want to free disk space.
artifacts.empty: You don't have any artifacts yet. They'll appear here as agents create them.

quota.uninitialized: System free-tier quota is not set up for your account yet. Please contact an administrator, or configure your own provider below to continue.
quota.title: System Free-Tier Quota
quota.preferToggle: Use free-tier quota even when I have my own provider configured
quota.preferOn: Currently: routing through system provider — free-tier usage applies. Falls back to your own provider if the free tier runs out.
quota.preferOff: Currently: using your own provider when configured; free tier only applies when you have no provider set.
quota.exhaustedNote: Free tier consumed. Add your own provider below, or uncheck the toggle above to route through your existing provider.

modal.title: Settings
modal.slotAgentDesc: The "brain" of your AI agent. This model handles all conversations with users, makes decisions, and executes tasks. A more capable model here means smarter, more nuanced responses.
modal.slotHelperDesc: A secondary AI model used for behind-the-scenes analysis: summarizing conversations, extracting key information, and generating internal reports. Does not talk to users directly, but influences the quality of the agent's background processing.
modal.slotsIntro: NarraNexus uses two AI model slots for different purposes. You can use the same provider for both, or mix and match to optimize for cost, speed, or quality.
modal.privacyIntro: Control what data NarraNexus collects to improve the product.
modal.analyticsDesc: Allow NarraNexus to collect anonymous usage data to improve the product. No conversation content is ever collected.

provider.presetNetmindDesc: One key covers both Anthropic & OpenAI endpoints
provider.pendingHint: Press Enter or click + to add “{{model}}” — otherwise it will be discarded.
provider.suggestionsHint: Suggestions — click to add. You can still type custom model names above.
provider.syncNothing: All providers already have the latest models — nothing to add.
provider.auxModelWarning: All auxiliary tasks will use this model. May affect speed/cost.
provider.noProtocolProvider: No {{protocol}} protocol provider configured. Add one in Step 1 above.
provider.section1Subtitle: Add API keys for your LLM providers. Each preset creates both Anthropic and OpenAI protocol endpoints automatically.
provider.quickAddDesc: Select a provider, paste your API key, and both protocol endpoints will be created automatically. New here? <hi>NetMind.AI Power</hi> is the easiest start — one key, and default models are pre-selected so you can finish right away.
provider.updateModelsDesc: Pull the latest default model list into your existing preset providers (NetMind, Claude Code, Yunwu, OpenRouter). Existing entries are kept; only missing models are appended.
provider.claudeOauthDesc: OAuth login via Claude Code CLI. No API key needed.
provider.webModeInstalled: Run "claude auth login" / "claude auth logout" in your terminal, then refresh this page.
provider.webModeNotInstalled: Install Claude Code CLI first, then run "claude auth login" in your terminal.
provider.cliNotInBundle: Claude Code CLI not found in bundle. Please rebuild the app.
provider.addedAsProvider: Added as a NarraNexus provider — assignable in Step 2 below.
provider.loginToAdd: Log in above to add Claude Code as a provider.
provider.anthropicEndpointHint: Anthropic API or any compatible endpoint.
provider.openaiEndpointHint: OpenAI API or any compatible endpoint.
provider.section2Subtitle: Assign a provider and model to each functional slot. All three must be configured for the agent to work.
provider.allSlotsReady: All model slots configured — agent is ready.
provider.editModelsHint: Add or remove the models this provider can serve. The provider's key and URL stay the same.
provider.readyIntro: Your key is in, and we've set up your model slots so you can start chatting right away:
provider.readyNote: Want different models? Change any slot in the configuration section below — your edits always win over these defaults.

teams.title: Team Management
teams.emptyList: No teams yet. Create one above.
teams.selectPrompt: Select a team or create a new one.
teams.introLabel: Bundle intro (markdown — shown to bundle recipients)

deleteConfirm.title: Delete team "{{name}}"?
deleteConfirm.message: Members are unlinked. Agents themselves are NOT deleted.

inbox.title: Agent Inbox
inbox.emptyHint: Channel messages will appear here once an agent receives one.

overlay.nothingToExplain: Nothing to explain on this page yet.

narrative.noHistoryHint: Start chatting to create your first narrative

worldview.emptyHint: Once your agents have talked with you, each one forms a view of who you are — they appear here.
worldview.summaryBody: {{count}} agent has each formed their own view of who you are — and hold their own picture of the world. Expand a lens to read both.
worldview.summaryBodyPlural: {{count}} agents have each formed their own view of who you are — and hold their own picture of the world. Expand a lens to read both.

memory.emptyHint: As your agents have real conversations, each topic becomes a storyline on this timeline.
memory.byTopic: · by topic, across all your agents

network.emptyHint: As your agents meet people and other agents, everyone they come to know shows up here.
network.legendHint: size · ring = how many agents know them
